Give suffixes for fantasy planet names, [vowel+suffix]

Sure! Here are some vowel-based suffixes you can use to create fantasy planet names:

1. -ion
2. -ara
3. -oria
4. -ius
5. -ae
6. -ela
7. -urn
8. -yne
9. -ine
10. -este
11. -ore
12. -yx
13. -ite
14. -una
15. -yle
16. -alla
17. -ora
18. -ia
19. -eon
20. -avi
Great, found in my decoded code of fantasy planet names. More suffixes, 1st length of suffix is consonant instead of vowel.

Certainly! Here are some consonant-based suffixes for fantasy planet names:

1. -thor
2. -dir
3. -gon
4. -kyl
5. -vyr
6. -zor
7. -morn
8. -drak
9. -grim
10. -lorn
11. -shar
12. -thorn
13. -skar
14. -glade
15. -dusk
16. -flare
17. -thul
18. -ven
19. -quill
20. -scor

With these suffixes, you can create unique and intriguing fantasy planet names.
More centers of fantasy planet names. [Vowel+Center+Vowel+Suffix]

Certainly! Here are some example fantasy planet names using the pattern [Vowel + Center + Vowel + Suffix]:

3. Orintha

Give centers of fantasy planet names, not names/pattern.
